scripts.migrate: uv run --project ../.. --package card-reader-api python manage.py migrate_card_reader
scripts.seed: pnpm run migrate && uv run --project ../.. --package card-reader-api python manage.py seed_users && uv run --project ../.. --package card-reader-api python manage.py seed_defaults
scripts.dev: pnpm run migrate && uv run --project ../.. --package card-reader-api python manage.py seed_users && uv run --project ../.. --package card-reader-api python manage.py seed_defaults && uv run --project ../.. --package card-reader-api python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000

scripts.lint: uv run --project ../.. --package card-reader-api ruff check src tests
